SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-23-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:45am
Judge Pro Tem Steven Kipperman, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. No appearance is made by the Appellant. Respondent David Schwartz appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Kipperman.

Previous exhibits returned to Respondent.

EXHR (A) Several pages outlining incident.

9:53am

Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
